title: hoya hasseltii
intro: Hoya hasseltii, a species of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family, is also known as the wax plant or porcelain flower due to its waxy, white, and fragrant blooms. Traditionally, Hoya hasseltii has been used in folk medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant has been valued for its health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues and fever, and it has also been used to aid in digestion. Hoya hasseltii can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture, allowing for various herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
